properties.valid_orders:
SELECT * FROM FLOWFILE
WHERE order_id IS NOT NULL
AND customer_name IS NOT NULL
AND TRIM(customer_name) <> ''
AND customer_name NOT IN ('N/A', 'null', 'None')

AND email IS NOT NULL
AND TRIM(email) <> ''
AND email NOT IN ('N/A', 'null', 'None')
AND email LIKE '%@%.%'
AND email NOT LIKE '%@@%'
AND email NOT LIKE '% %'
AND email NOT LIKE '@%'

AND product IS NOT NULL
AND TRIM(product) <> ''
AND product NOT IN ('N/A', 'null', 'None')

AND quantity > 0
AND price > 0

AND order_date IS NOT NULL
AND TRIM(order_date) <> ''
AND order_date NOT IN ('N/A', 'null', 'None')

AND shipping_address IS NOT NULL
AND TRIM(shipping_address) <> ''
AND shipping_address NOT IN ('N/A', 'null', 'None')

AND status IN ('pending', 'shipped', 'delivered', 'cancelled', 'processing', 'returned')
properties.invalid_orders:
SELECT * FROM FLOWFILE
WHERE NOT (
order_id IS NOT NULL
AND customer_name IS NOT NULL
AND TRIM(customer_name) <> ''
AND customer_name NOT IN ('N/A', 'null', 'None')

AND email IS NOT NULL
AND TRIM(email) <> ''
AND email NOT IN ('N/A', 'null', 'None')
AND email LIKE '%@%.%'
AND email NOT LIKE '%@@%'
AND email NOT LIKE '% %'
AND email NOT LIKE '@%'

AND product IS NOT NULL
AND TRIM(product) <> ''
AND product NOT IN ('N/A', 'null', 'None')

AND quantity > 0
AND price > 0

AND order_date IS NOT NULL
AND TRIM(order_date) <> ''
AND order_date NOT IN ('N/A', 'null', 'None')

AND shipping_address IS NOT NULL
AND TRIM(shipping_address) <> ''
AND shipping_address NOT IN ('N/A', 'null', 'None')

AND status IN ('pending', 'shipped', 'delivered', 'cancelled', 'processing', 'returned')
)
